title: SAE Aero Design Simulation Review Tracker
workflow: Report the issue and its scope.
Wait for user approval before fixing.
If the user does not approve, move the issue to Pending - not approved.
If the user approves, implement the fix and record the result.
Keep this tracker document updated after every decision and fix.

issues.title: Dynamic pressure uses inertial speed instead of air-relative airspeed
issues.scope: Simulation/SimulationDemo.slx internal Flight Parameters subsystem (system_1153.xml). Affects aerodynamic force and moment magnitudes whenever wind is nonzero.
issues.evidence: The Dynamic Pressure block is fed by <Ve>, while alpha, beta, and TAS are computed from body velocity minus uvw_wind.
issues.proposedFix: Rewire dynamic pressure to use air-relative speed and add a regression case for steady crosswind.
log: 2026-06-10 - Approval requested from user before implementation.

issues.title: Environment presets are not faithfully wired into the active model
issues.scope: Environment atmosphere, wind, turbulence, and site initialization paths. Affects competition realism and any student conclusion about weather or density altitude.
issues.evidence: environmentLibrary says env.Atmosphere is display-only, Initialization zeros latitude/longitude/Altitude_MSL, the active COESA block is hard-set to a High temperature profile, and the Dryden block has hardcoded settings including T_on=off and Wingspan=geometry.Area.
issues.proposedFix: Make the active model consume preset atmosphere and turbulence fields, pass the correct wingspan, and align initialization with the selected environment.

issues.title: Propulsion model has nonphysical scaling and a prop-arm interface mismatch
issues.scope: Propulsion thrust and propulsion moment generation. Affects takeoff, climb, trim, and moment prediction.
issues.evidence: Thrust is lookup-based, scaled by rho/1.225, then multiplied by Gain=2. Propulsion moments read geometry.PropArmX/Y/Z while setup live scripts define geometry.Prop.X/Y/Z.
issues.proposedFix: Remove or justify the thrust scaling, standardize the prop-arm interface, and verify thrust-line moments against a hand-check case.

issues.title: Repository carries stale and incompatible architectures
issues.scope: Project entry points, environment architecture, and student workflow. Affects reproducibility and user trust before any simulation starts.
issues.evidence: RC_Demo.prj is a stub, active shortcuts live in resources/project, loadEnvironmentPreset expects missing SLDD assets, and several scripts still point students to SimulationChallenge.slx which is not present.
issues.proposedFix: Choose one supported architecture, remove or replace dead paths, and update all student-facing entry points to the current model.

issues.title: Solver configuration is too coarse for RC 6-DOF simulation
issues.scope: Global simulation fidelity, especially attitude transients and pilot-in-loop response.
issues.evidence: The model is configured with ode1be, fixed step 0.1, and RelTol 1e-3.
issues.proposedFix: Retune the solver for the plant and controller dynamics, then verify response sensitivity to step size.

issues.title: Aerodynamic data validation is too weak
issues.scope: Manual and DATCOM import paths. Affects sign conventions, units, stall capture, and out-of-range table behavior.
issues.evidence: The current pipeline does basic file checks but does not robustly catch negative CD, wrong-sign Cm slope, rad/deg mismatches, or missing DATCOM values that get zero-filled.
issues.proposedFix: Add physics-based validation checks and fail fast on unit/sign errors or unsupported table coverage.

issues.title: Competition scoring and mission paths are inconsistent
issues.scope: Mission scoring, mission setup, and competition realism outputs.
issues.evidence: environmentLibrary writes env.Multiplier, while scoringEngine requires environment.ScoreMultiplier. missionSetup and missionLibrary also rely on older workspace contracts and missing files.
issues.proposedFix: Unify the scoring field names, align mission scripts to the current setup path, and revalidate against the intended competition rules.

issues.title: Bus and unit architecture is not self-contained
issues.scope: Signal interface clarity and reproducibility of model setup.
issues.evidence: Initialization comments reference bus definitions, strict bus diagnostics are enabled, but no checked-in BusDefinitions.m or visible Simulink.Bus creation path was found.
issues.proposedFix: Check in the actual bus definition source or generate it in one visible script with explicit unit conventions.

issues.title: RC calibration code relies on base workspace magic and silent fallbacks
issues.scope: Pilot input calibration and controller mask initialization.
issues.evidence: Calibrated_Controller uses evalin and assignin, broad catch blocks, and silently falls back to defaults when configuration load paths fail.
issues.proposedFix: Replace base-workspace coupling with explicit data flow and make failures visible and actionable.

issues.title: Educational traceability from physics to implementation is too weak
issues.evidence: Overview.mlx is good for workflow navigation, but the repo does not provide a clear equation-to-block trace for frames, qbar, sign conventions, derivatives, and thrust-line moments.
issues.proposedFix: Add a short equation-to-block guide and targeted exercises that expose common student modeling mistakes.
